notes: Best overall provider: `tesseract/tesseract` scored 98.01/100 using balanced overall weighting.
Worst overall provider: `openai/gpt-5.4-nano` scored 64.35/100 using balanced overall weighting.
The cheapest cloud provider was `glm/glm-ocr` at 0.0340¢ ($0.0003).

tiers.label: Tier 1
tiers.description: Best balanced options across accuracy, processing speed, and cost efficiency.

tiers.label: Tier 2
tiers.description: Middle options that miss Tier 1 but may have a specific accuracy, speed, or cost advantage.

tiers.label: Tier 3
tiers.description: Lowest balanced options, generally weaker across the combined benchmark categories.
